auditStatement: Employee sample-employee was offboarded on 2026-04-30. All console access, access keys, group memberships, and attached policies have been removed in accordance with NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls AC-2 (Account Management) and PS-4 (Personnel Termination). This report constitutes evidence for the System Security Plan (SSP) and continuous monitoring activities.

controlsSummary.AC-2: Account Management — IAM user disabled and tagged
controlsSummary.AC-3: Access Enforcement — All group memberships removed
controlsSummary.PS-4: Personnel Termination — Full access revocation completed
controlsSummary.IA-4: Identifier Management — User identifier tagged as offboarded
controlsSummary.AU-2: Event Logging — All actions logged to CloudTrail
controlsSummary.AU-11: Audit Record Retention — Evidence archived to encrypted S3
controlsSummary.AU-12: Audit Record Generation — DynamoDB audit record written
controlsSummary.IR-6: Incident Reporting — SNS notification sent to security team
controlsSummary.SI-12: Information Handling — IAM snapshot preserved before removal
